import pandas as pd

opportunities_data = locals()['var_function-call-6669191338500195843']
contracts_data = locals()['var_function-call-16750668743038360166']

df_opportunities = pd.DataFrame(opportunities_data)
df_contracts = pd.DataFrame(contracts_data)

# Clean IDs by removing '#' and stripping whitespace
df_opportunities['Id'] = df_opportunities['Id'].astype(str).str.replace('#', '', regex=False).str.strip()
df_opportunities['ContractID__c'] = df_opportunities['ContractID__c'].astype(str).str.replace('#', '', regex=False).str.strip()
df_opportunities['OwnerId'] = df_opportunities['OwnerId'].astype(str).str.replace('#', '', regex=False).str.strip()

df_contracts['Id'] = df_contracts['Id'].astype(str).str.replace('#', '', regex=False).str.strip()

# Convert date fields to datetime objects
df_opportunities['CreatedDate'] = pd.to_datetime(df_opportunities['CreatedDate'])
df_contracts['CompanySignedDate'] = pd.to_datetime(df_contracts['CompanySignedDate'])

# Merge the dataframes on ContractID__c and Contract.Id
merged_df = pd.merge(df_opportunities, df_contracts, left_on='ContractID__c', right_on='Id', how='inner', suffixes=('_opportunity', '_contract'))

# Calculate turnaround time in days
merged_df['TurnaroundTime'] = (merged_df['CompanySignedDate'] - merged_df['CreatedDate']).dt.days

# Filter for positive turnaround times (closing after opening)
merged_df = merged_df[merged_df['TurnaroundTime'] >= 0]

# Group by OwnerId and calculate the average turnaround time
average_turnaround = merged_df.groupby('OwnerId')['TurnaroundTime'].mean().reset_index()

# Find the agent with the quickest (minimum) average turnaround time
quickest_agent = average_turnaround.loc[average_turnaround['TurnaroundTime'].idxmin()]

print("__RESULT__:")
print(quickest_agent['OwnerId'])
